steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User reports VPN connection drops every 10 minutes on macOS Sequoia
steps.output_summary: Plan: search docs for VPN macOS issues, try multiple queries if needed

steps.name: search_docs
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-3102 VPN Troubleshooting (Windows only). No macOS match.

steps.name: search_docs
steps.input_summary: Query: macOS network keep-alive VPN client
steps.output_summary: No new results. KB-3102 returned again with low relevance score.

steps.name: search_api
steps.input_summary: Query vendor API for VPN macOS disconnect issue
steps.output_summary: API returned advisory about v4.2.1 bug but agent context already saturated with repeated doc results

steps.name: loop_detected
steps.input_summary: Harness detected repeated retrieval pattern with diminishing relevance scores
steps.output_summary: Terminated run: agent failed to synthesize a response after retrieval loop consumed context budget

result.label: fail
result.summary: Agent retrieved API advisory but context was polluted by repeated doc searches; harness terminated before synthesis
